response.justification: Maria has strong software engineering and TypeScript/cloud credentials with recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, but falls significantly short of the 8+ years AI experience requirement with only ~1 year visible AI background. Critical gaps include no Python expertise (standard for AI/ML roles), no demonstrated knowledge of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or multi-agent frameworks, and no data pipeline/ML infrastructure background. While her production systems expertise and MCP work show potential, she lacks the depth and breadth of AI/ML production experience required for a staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and Node.js production experience with AWS cloud platform expertise (CDK)
Current direct involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators shows recent AI-focused work
Demonstrated software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring) and proven ability to build and ship production systems
concerns: No Python experience listed despite Python being a required qualification for AI/ML development
Only ~1 year of visible AI/ML-focused work versus 8+ years required; career background is primarily full-stack web/backend development
No demonstrated expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, multi-agent frameworks, or data pipeline architecture

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and AI-agent infrastructure involvement
